SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.execution.resilience

Class ResilienceFailoverExecution<T>

java.lang.Object
com.societegenerale.failover.core.BasicFailoverExecution<T>
com.societegenerale.failover.execution.resilience.ResilienceFailoverExecution<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the return type of the protected method
All Implemented Interfaces:
FailoverExecution<T>
public class ResilienceFailoverExecution<T> extends BasicFailoverExecution<T>
BasicFailoverExecution extension that wraps each supplier with a Resilience4j CircuitBreaker named after the failover point.
Author:
Anand Manissery

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ResilienceFailoverExecution(FailoverHandler<T> failoverHandler, MethodExceptionHandler methodExceptionHandler, io.github.resilience4j.circuitbreaker.CircuitBreakerRegistry circuitBreakerRegistry)
    Creates a resilience-backed failover execution.

    decorateSupplier(Failover failover, Supplier<T> supplier, List<Object> args)

  • Constructor Details

    • ResilienceFailoverExecution

      public ResilienceFailoverExecution(FailoverHandler<T> failoverHandler, MethodExceptionHandler methodExceptionHandler, io.github.resilience4j.circuitbreaker.CircuitBreakerRegistry circuitBreakerRegistry)
      Creates a resilience-backed failover execution.
      Parameters:
      failoverHandler - handler for store and recover operations
      methodExceptionHandler - policy for handling exceptions after recovery
      circuitBreakerRegistry - Resilience4j registry used to look up circuit breakers by name

  • Method Details

    • decorateSupplier

      protected Supplier<T> decorateSupplier(Failover failover, Supplier<T> supplier, List<Object> args)
      Description copied from class: BasicFailoverExecution
      Extension point for subclasses to wrap the supplier (e.g. to add context propagation). This base implementation is a pass-through.
      Overrides:
      decorateSupplier in class BasicFailoverExecution<T>
      Parameters:
      failover - annotation metadata for the failover point
      supplier - the supplier to optionally wrap
      args - method arguments
      Returns:
      the (possibly wrapped) supplier
